name: Creamy Tomato Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pureed fresh tomatoes (or canned unsalted tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain a 10.5 oz. package of Mori-Nu Silken Tofu (soft).
2. Optionally add a pinch of salt; you may also add margarine or butter if desired.
3. In a medium saucepan, sauté onions in chicken stock until transparent.
4. Add pureed tomatoes along with the next three ingredients.
5. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Process tofu until smooth and stir into the tomato mixture.
7. Simmer again and serve hot.
Makes 3 servings of 8 oz. each. Per serving (without salt): 101 calories, 7 g protein, 2.8 g fat, 13.4 g carbohydrates, 0 mg cholesterol, 14 mg sodium. Optional ingredients are not included in the nutritional calculations.
Posted by Helen Fleischer.
